summary: Iteration 59 - Bug Fix Verification Complete. All 3 reported bugs have been FIXED: 1) Predictions no longer show 'Locked' when contest status is 'live' (lock_time is now ignored when status=live), 2) Predictions can be submitted successfully when contest is live, 3) Admin can delete contests from dashboard with refund logic working.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG 1 FIX VERIFIED: contests.py Lines 320-340 - get_contest_questions now returns is_locked=false when contest_status='live', ignoring lock_time
BUG 2 FIX VERIFIED: contests.py Lines 370-395 - submit_predictions no longer checks lock_time when contest status is 'live'
BUG 3 FIX VERIFIED: admin.py Lines 1573-1601 - delete_single_contest endpoint works correctly, returns entries_removed and refunds_issued
Frontend PredictionPage.jsx Lines 67-70 - isLocked/canEdit logic correctly uses contest_status, not lock_time
Frontend AdminContestsTab.jsx Lines 78-85 - handleDelete calls DELETE /api/admin/contests/{id} correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test contest TEST_DELETE_CONTEST_ITER59 for delete endpoint testing (auto-deleted)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59 verified all 3 bug fixes: 1) Lock status now based on contest_status only (not lock_time) when status='live', 2) Predictions can be submitted on live contests, 3) Admin delete contest endpoint works with refund logic. Live contest ID: 169d854b-e073-4118-a18d-47338e677cba (PBKS vs GT, status: live). All backend tests pass. UI testing confirmed: prediction page shows 'Submit (16/16)' button enabled, options are clickable, delete button visible in admin dashboard.

bug_1_lock_status_fix.ui_test: PASSED - Options are clickable, not disabled on prediction page

bug_3_admin_delete_fix.api_test: PASSED - DELETE /api/admin/contests/{id} returns success with entries_removed and refunds_issued
bug_3_admin_delete_fix.ui_test: PASSED - Delete button visible and clickable in admin Matches tab

player_view.contest_card: PASSED - Shows 500 coins, Pool 500, 1/1000 participants, LIVE status
player_view.predict_button: PASSED - Clickable, navigates to prediction page
